title: derris pubinervis
intro: Derris pubinervis, also known as the Kanabo plant or Derris, is a perennial vine native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. It is a member of the Fabaceae family and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a natural insecticide and anthelmintic agent. The plant contains rotenone, a toxic compound with anthelmintic and insecticidal properties, which can help to eliminate intestinal parasites and pests, thereby promoting overall health and well-being. In herbal medicine, Derris pubinervis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues.
